prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年第29名，近年排名稳定在28–31名区间，属全国顶尖综合性大学；抖音热度排名第28（较热），综合热度约170万；未见明显投档断档记录；统计学A+、软件工程A、数学A、心理学A、地理学A、教育学A+等14个学科获评A-及以上，理科组招生专业（统计学类、计算机科学与技术、软件工程、数据科学与大数据技术等）与优势学科高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类2024年评估为“推荐”（热度较2023年有所降温但仍偏热），电子信息/通信为“高热推荐”，电气工程为“高热推荐”，理工科热门专业整体热度高；本省2026年物理类考生约26.8万人，与2025年基本持平；华东师范大学位于上海，对江西考生有较强地域吸引力；上海在电子信息、金融等行业的就业优势对理科考生吸引力显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅反弹、2026年招生计划持平、考生数稳定、理工科热门专业热度持续等因素，在2025年基准4295名基础上预计竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约4325名，区间3832–4818名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 2589 → 2816 → 4196 → 5596 → 4295. From 2021 to 2023, the ranking continued to decline. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking significantly dropped to 5596. In 2025, it rebounded notably to 4295, with a rebound range of about 1301 places. The enrollment plan for this university in the Jiangxi science group was 42 in 2021, 51 in 2022, 51 in 2023, 59 in 2024, and 58 in 2025, showing an overall expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 58, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 29th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable ranking range of 28–31 in recent years, belonging to a top national comprehensive university; Douyin popularity ranking 28th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.7 million; no obvious records of admission cutoff breaks; 14 disciplines including Statistics A+, Software Engineering A, Mathematics A, Psychology A, Geography A, Education A+ have been rated A- or above, and the science group enrollment majors (Statistics, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, etc.) are highly matched with advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science was assessed as 'Recommended' in 2024 (popularity has cooled compared to 2023 but remains relatively hot), Electronics/Communication is 'Highly Recommended Hot', Electrical Engineering is 'Highly Recommended Hot', and popular science and engineering majors overall have high popularity; the number of physics category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 268,000, basically unchanged from 2025; East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, which has a strong regional appeal to Jiangxi candidates; Shanghai's employment advantages in electronics, information, finance, and other industries are significantly attractive to science candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant rebound in rankings in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, stable candidate numbers, and sustained popularity of popular science and engineering majors, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 4295; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4325, with a range of 3832–4818.
